name: Upstart Holdings, Inc.
summary: Upstart Holdings, Inc. is an AI-powered lending marketplace founded in 2012 that facilitates personal loans, auto loans, and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs). Using proprietary AI models, Upstart aims to improve credit risk assessment beyond traditional FICO-based systems, enabling higher approval rates and lower interest rates. Loans are funded through a network of bank and credit union lending partners, institutional investors, securitization programs, and balance sheet holdings. In 2025, 91% of loans on its platform were fully automated.

products.name: Upstart AI Lending Marketplace
products.description: AI-powered marketplace facilitating personal, auto, and HELOC loans with automated underwriting and risk separation.

products.name: Upstart Auto Finance Software
products.description: Software used by auto dealerships to facilitate automotive retail lending through Upstart's platform.

products.name: Upstart.com
products.description: Primary consumer-facing portal for accessing Upstart-powered loans.

products.name: Securitization and Pass-Through Programs
products.description: Programs allowing institutional investors to invest in securities collateralized by Upstart-powered loans.

partnerships.description: Lending partners retain or purchase loans originated on Upstart's marketplace; accounted for 26% of loan principal in 2025.
Institutional investors purchase loans and invest in securitizations; accounted for 64% of loan principal in 2025.
